abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Career Counselor
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an ally within 6" resolves the Prepare action, it may gain two tokens instead of one.

abilities.name: Reverse Gravity
abilities.text: Once per activation. After another model places within 6", this model may drain a (soulstone) to place it anywhere within 6" of this model.

actions.name: Dissectors
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model and the target have any matching suits in their final duel totals, increase this model's final duel total by 1.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

actions.name: Cruel Experiment
actions.costs_and_restrictions: An ally with LoS to the target may move up to 3" toward it.

triggers.name: "Knowledge is Power!"
triggers.text: Choose a suit. When resolving, discard the top three cards of your fate deck. This action deals +1 damage for every card of the chosen suit discarded.

triggers.name: Catch a Glimpse
triggers.text: Look at the top two cards of your fate deck, then place them back in the same order.

actions.name: Grade Assignment
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an ally of lower cost. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target declares an attack action. If the generated action deals 3 or more damage, the target heals 2.
